sections.paragraph:
an unused root-

(1) Arab. تَفَلَ to spit, to spit out, Med. E, to be insipid, unseasoned (compare רִיר חַלָּמוּת Job 6:6), Ch. to be unsalted. Hence תָּפֵל, תִּפְלָה.

(2) to glue or stick on (pr. with spittle?), like the Ch. טְפַל (comp. Heb. טָפַל). Hence תָּפֵל No. 2, lime, cement.
